title: Trade good
description: One tradeable commodity. base_price is the universe-average the economy engine perturbs from; supply/demand at each location moves the live price.

legality.description: faction id -> legal status of carrying this good in their space.

loose_cargo.description: Rides the hold unsecured: a hit that breaches the hold can vent a unit of this good into space as a drifting, briefly recoverable canister. Mission-critical crates should never set this.
